creator: cpiazza@home.net
text:
On Mon, Sep 06, 1999 at 12:10:02PM -0700, TAOKA Satoshi wrote:
> 
>  Hi Taguchi-san,
>  
>  I fetched expect.tar.gz from  http://expect.nist.gov/.
>  It mismatched one in files/md5.

I hit this too on the lang/expect port.  I couldn't find any 
reason for it on the expect web site, so I just updated it.

===================================================================
RCS file: /home/ncvs/ports/lang/expect/files/md5,v
retrieving revision 1.15
retrieving revision 1.16
diff -p -u -r1.15 -r1.16
--- ports/lang/expect/files/md5 1999/08/19 03:19:01     1.15
+++ /home/ncvs/ports/lang/expect/files/md5      1999/09/06 05:20:00     1.16
@@ -1 +1 @@
-MD5 (expect.tar.gz) = fdfb69b8f41802e690bc7d002c559d72
+MD5 (expect.tar.gz) = 947ac547a40b02e7db0ecdae84b33ca7

-Chris

cpiazza@home.net              cpiazza@FreeBSD.org

they are hanged."                --Heinrich Heine
